hero.title: Power Solutions Built for Tomorrow's Demands
hero.subtitle: On Capacitor engineers high-performance capacitor systems for industrial, commercial, and R&D applications — delivering reliability where it matters most.

features.title: Built for the World's Most Demanding Applications.
features.lead: From induction furnaces to fusion energy research to national grid infrastructure — we engineer capacitors where performance and reliability are non-negotiable.

items.title: Induction Heating
items.body: Resonant tank capacitors and capacitor banks for induction heating and induction melting systems. Engineered for continuous high-frequency, high-reactive-power operation in steel, aluminium, and precious metal foundries.

items.title: Pulse Power
items.body: High-energy, fast-discharge pulse capacitors for nuclear fusion research and other pulsed power applications. Designed to store and release enormous energy in sub-microsecond pulses, cycle after cycle.

items.title: High Voltage
items.body: Shunt capacitor banks and harmonic filter capacitors for AC transmission and distribution substations. Available from 10 kV to 220 kV, compliant with GB/T and IEC standards.

about_teaser.title: Decades of Expertise in Capacitor Technology
body: On Capacitor was founded on a simple belief: that precision-engineered energy storage components should be accessible to every engineer, researcher, and manufacturer who needs them.

From our facility, we design and manufacture capacitor systems that power everything from industrial automation to cutting-edge research equipment — with the same commitment to quality on every order.

products_preview.title: Induction Heating. Pulse Power. High Voltage.
products_preview.lead: Three focused product lines, each engineered to the specific demands of its application — from metal foundries and fusion research to national grid substations.

cta.title: Ready to power your next project?
cta.body: Talk to our engineering team and find the right capacitor solution for your application.
